div.style: font-family: Inter, Arial, sans-serif; background: #F9FAFB; padding: 16px; border-radius: 14px; width: 100%; max-width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box;
background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 14px; padding: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; border: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%; background: #DBEAFE; color: #2563EB; display: grid; place-items: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700;

span.style: background: #22C55E; color: white; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 10px; margin-left: 8px; font-weight: 500;

div.style: background: #DBEAFE; color: #1D4ED8; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 14px 14px 0 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #93C5FD;

span.style: font-size: 11px; background: #2563EB; color: white; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 6px; margin-right: 8px;
background: #DCFCE7; color: #15803D; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500;
background: #FFEDD5; color: #C2410C; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500;

span.t-att-style: 'background: #F3F4F6; color: #374151; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 10px; border: 1px solid #E5E7EB;'

div.style: font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6B7280; letter-spacing: 0.4px;
background: #EEF2FF; border: 1px solid #C7D2FE; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px; margin-bottom: 10px;
font-size: 10px; color: #4338CA; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-bottom: 4px;

div.t-att-style: 'background: ' + this.noveltyKpi.bg + '; border: 1px solid ' + this.noveltyKpi.color + '55; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 12px;'

td.t-att-style: 'padding: 10px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E7EB; text-align: right; font-family: monospace; font-size: 13px;' + (step.highlight ? 'color: #15803D; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #1F2937; font-weight: 500;')

t.t-if: step.value !== null and step.value !== undefined and step.value !== '' and step.value !== 0 or step.format === 'currency'

div.style: margin-top: 16px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FEF3C7 0%, #FDE68A 100%); border: 1px solid #F59E0B; border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px 16px; animation: slideInUp 0.4s ease-out;
width: 40px; height: 40px; background: #F59E0B; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; animation: pulse 2s infinite;
font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; color: #92400E; letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-bottom: 4px;

span.style: background: #FEF3C7; border: 1px solid #F59E0B; color: #92400E; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 10px;

div.style: margin-top: 12px; background: #F9FAFB; border: 1px solid #E5E7EB; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 14px;

span.t-att-style: 'padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; ' + (state.formulaData.variacion > 0 ? 'background: #DCFCE7; color: #15803D;' : state.formulaData.variacion < 0 ? 'background: #FEE2E2; color: #B91C1C;' : 'background: #F3F4F6; color: #6B7280;')

div.t-att-style: 'margin-top: 16px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, ' + socialSecurityKPI.config.colorBg + '15 0%, ' + socialSecurityKPI.config.colorBg + '08 100%); border: 1px solid ' + socialSecurityKPI.config.colorBg + '40; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; animation: slideInUp 0.4s ease-out;'

'width: 48px; height: 48px; background: ' + socialSecurityKPI.config.colorBg + '; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px ' + socialSecurityKPI.config.colorBg + '40;'

div.style: background: white; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; border: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; color: #6B7280; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #9CA3AF; font-style: italic; margin-top: 2px;
font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace; color: #1F2937; background: #F3F4F6; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 6px; margin-top: 2px;

div.t-att-style: 'display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; animation: bounce 1s ease-in-out; ' + (adv.tipo === 'warning' ? 'background: #FEF3C7; color: #B45309; border: 1px solid #F59E0B;' : 'background: #DBEAFE; color: #1D4ED8; border: 1px solid #3B82F6;')

div.style: background: white; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px; text-align: center; border: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
background: white; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px; text-align: center; border: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
background: white; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px; text-align: center; border: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E5E7EB; border-radius: 14px; margin-bottom: 16px; padding: 16px;

span.style: background: #DBEAFE; color: #1D4ED8; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600;

div.style: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 2px; margin-bottom: 12px;

div.t-att-style: 'width: 22px; height: 28px; border-radius: 4px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 9px; background: ' + day.color + '; color: white;' + (day.isVirtual ? ' opacity: 0.6; border: 1px dashed #6B7280;' : '')
div.t-att-title: day.isVirtual ? 'Día ' + day.day + ' (Virtual - Colombia 30 días)' : day.date + ' - ' + (day.type === 'work' ? 'Laboral' : day.type === 'saturday_work' ? 'Sábado Laboral' : day.type === 'saturday' ? 'Sábado' : day.type === 'sunday' ? 'Domingo' : day.type === 'holiday' ? 'Festivo' : 'Virtual')

div.style: background: #FFEDD5; border: 1px solid #FB923C; border-radius: 6px; padding: 4px 8px; font-size: 10px;

span.style: background: #DCFCE7; color: #15803D; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;

div.style: background: #E5E7EB; height: 8px; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 12px;

div.t-att-style: 'width: ' + state.loanDetails.progress + '%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #22C55E, #4ADE80); height: 100%; transition: width 0.5s;'

div.style: padding: 8px 16px; padding-left: 48px; background: white; border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
display: flex; align-items: center; font-size: 11px; color: #6B7280;
background: #DBEAFE; padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 1px solid #93C5FD;

th.style: padding: 8px 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid #93C5FD; text-align: center; color: #1F2937; width: 50px;
padding: 8px 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid #93C5FD; text-align: left; color: #1F2937; width: 80px;
padding: 8px 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid #93C5FD; text-align: left; color: #1F2937;
padding: 8px 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid #93C5FD; text-align: left; color: #1F2937;
padding: 8px 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid #93C5FD; text-align: left; color: #1F2937;
padding: 8px 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid #93C5FD; text-align: left; color: #1F2937;
padding: 8px 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid #93C5FD; text-align: left; color: #1F2937;
padding: 8px 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid #93C5FD; text-align: center; color: #1F2937;
padding: 8px 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid #93C5FD; text-align: right; color: #1F2937;

span.style: background: #DBEAFE; color: #2563EB; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 500;

td.style: padding: 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E7EB; font-family: monospace; color: #2563EB; font-weight: 500;

span.style: background: #FFEDD5; color: #C2410C; padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 9px; margin-left: 4px;
background: #DCFCE7; color: #15803D; padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 9px; margin-left: 4px;

span.t-att-style: 'cursor: pointer; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 9px; ' + (dl.is_other_period ? 'background: #F97316; color: white;' : 'background: #DCFCE7; color: #15803D;')

td.t-att-style: 'padding: 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E7EB; text-align: right; font-family: monospace; font-weight: 600; ' + (dl.dev_or_ded === 'devengo' ? 'color: #22C55E;' : 'color: #F97316;')

td.style: padding: 8px 6px; border-top: 2px solid #93C5FD; text-align: right; color: #1F2937;
padding: 8px 6px; border-top: 2px solid #93C5FD; text-align: right; font-family: monospace; color: #1F2937;

th.style: padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #FB923C; text-align: center; color: #C2410C; width: 50px;
padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #FB923C; text-align: left; color: #C2410C; width: 80px;
padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #FB923C; text-align: left; color: #C2410C;
padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #FB923C; text-align: left; color: #C2410C;
padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #FB923C; text-align: left; color: #C2410C;
padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #FB923C; text-align: left; color: #C2410C;
padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #FB923C; text-align: right; color: #C2410C;

span.style: background: #FFEDD5; color: #C2410C; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 500;

td.style: padding: 6px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E7EB; font-family: monospace; color: #C2410C; font-weight: 500;

span.style: background: #F97316; color: white; padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 9px; margin-left: 4px;

td.t-att-style: 'padding: 6px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E7EB; text-align: right; font-family: monospace; font-weight: 600; ' + (nov.dev_or_ded === 'devengo' ? 'color: #22C55E;' : 'color: #F97316;')

td.style: padding: 8px 12px; border-top: 2px solid #FB923C; text-align: right; color: #C2410C;
padding: 8px 12px; border-top: 2px solid #FB923C; text-align: right; font-family: monospace; color: #C2410C;

th.style: padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #86EFAC; text-align: center; color: #15803D; width: 50px;
padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #86EFAC; text-align: left; color: #15803D; width: 80px;
padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #86EFAC; text-align: left; color: #15803D;
padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #86EFAC; text-align: left; color: #15803D;
padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #86EFAC; text-align: left; color: #15803D;
padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #86EFAC; text-align: right; color: #15803D;

span.style: background: #DCFCE7; color: #15803D; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 500;

td.style: padding: 6px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E7EB; font-family: monospace; color: #15803D; font-weight: 500;

td.t-att-style: 'padding: 6px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E7EB; text-align: right; font-family: monospace; font-weight: 600; ' + (cc.dev_or_ded === 'devengo' ? 'color: #22C55E;' : 'color: #F97316;')

td.style: padding: 8px 12px; border-top: 2px solid #86EFAC; text-align: right; color: #15803D;
padding: 8px 12px; border-top: 2px solid #86EFAC; text-align: right; font-family: monospace; color: #15803D;

span.t-att-style: 'padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 10px; ' + (state.payslip?.state === 'done' ? 'background: #DCFCE7; color: #15803D;' : state.payslip?.state === 'verify' ? 'background: #FFEDD5; color: #C2410C;' : 'background: #DBEAFE; color: #1D4ED8;')
